metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by Pupfish Analytics

plugins.name: qlik-toolkit
plugins.description: Make Claude Code fluent in Qlik Sense. Install once and Claude becomes a Qlik developer you can delegate to, with deep platform knowledge, specialist agents for different tasks, and an automatic syntax check on every script.

plugins.name: qlik-agents
plugins.description: A multi-agent development pipeline for Qlik Sense. You provide source materials and requirements; the pipeline produces production-grade load scripts, expressions, visualization specs, QA reports, and documentation through a structured 9-phase workflow. Most users should prefer qlik-toolkit for ad-hoc work.
